query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.title,
  COUNT(DISTINCT pq.id) as practice_questions,
  COUNT(DISTINCT qq.id) as quiz_questions
FROM bridge_academy_courses c
LEFT JOIN bridge_academy_practice_questions pq ON c.id = pq.courseId
LEFT JOIN bridge_academy_quiz_questions qq ON c.id = qq.courseId
GROUP BY c.id, c.title
ORDER BY c.id;
